Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I got really into my reading last night... and never went to sleep...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I thought I'd be fine, since I've lost sleep from the pain and anxiety of my illness before, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I suppose I'm not doing my health any favors like this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_001_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You need to listen to your body.

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 13 20 15 117}...Thank you. Or rather, I suppose I should apologize.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}It's been so long since anyone told me off for anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Don't worry, I know my limits... and how to convince my body that it's still doing fine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I came out here because I was hoping to find you. I only have so much time left, you know...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}...Do you remember when I said I like reading heartwarming stories?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}There are as many stories as there are stars in the sky, but I don't think any of them are what I'm looking for.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}The problem is... none of those stories were written for people like me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}You're always coming to visit me, keeping me company and talking with me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}How much of your valuable time have you spent with me?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I don't deserve it. You're spoiling me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}That's why I like you so much, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kamiki smiled weakly at me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 117 1 25 25}Sorry... I was in such a good mood that I overexerted myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Kamiki,[n]then headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
